intended_use.primary_use: Stock price prediction and trading signal generation
intended_use.out_of_scope: Not suitable for long-term investment decisions

limitations.market_conditions: Performance may vary in different market regimes
limitations.data_quality: Dependent on data quality and availability
limitations.overfitting_risk: Regular monitoring required to detect performance degradation

ethical_considerations.fairness: Model should be regularly audited for bias
ethical_considerations.transparency: Feature importance analysis should be provided
